projectDescription: A Python desktop application with a tkinter GUI for loading CSV files and performing statistical analysis using pandas.
keyFeatures: Load and preview CSV files through a graphical interface
Generate descriptive statistical summaries (count, mean, std, min, max, percentiles)
Analyze all columns or select specific columns for targeted analysis
Handles both numeric and categorical columns via pandas describe(include='all')
Displays results in a readable grid table format using tabulate
Scrollable results pane for navigating large datasets
publicApiSurface: generar_resumen_estadistico(df) — generates a statistical summary table from a pandas DataFrame
analizar_csv(ruta_archivo) — reads a CSV file and returns its statistical summary
DataAnalyzerApp(ventana) — tkinter application class for the graphical interface
DataAnalyzerApp.cargar_csv() — opens a file dialog to load a CSV file
DataAnalyzerApp.analizar_todo() — analyzes all columns of the loaded DataFrame
DataAnalyzerApp.mostrar_selector_columnas() — shows column selection dialog for partial analysis
